short_blurb: Roofing repairs and replacement for San Fernando homes and businesses.
local_note: The City of San Fernando is one of the Valley's oldest incorporated communities, with a housing stock that includes many pre-1960 homes. Older homes often have original roofing layers that need a full tear-off rather than an overlay to meet current code. We handle full tear-offs, dry-rot decking repairs, and complete system replacements — and we pull all permits with the City of San Fernando Building Department.

faqs.q: My San Fernando home has two layers of shingles — can you add a third?
faqs.a: No — California Building Code limits residential roofs to two layers of composition shingle. If you already have two layers, the existing material must be torn off before a new system can be installed. We handle full tear-offs and decking inspection as part of every replacement.
